test_cases.name: happy_path_married_w2_standard_deduction
test_cases.scenario: Married couple with W-2 income only, no itemizable deductions, standard deduction is optimal. Tests complete happy path through all phases.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes all 6 phases successfully. Identifies standard deduction as optimal. Calculates child tax credit ($2,000 per child). Provides tax profile, deductions analysis, credits analysis, timing strategies, savings estimate, and prioritized recommendations.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Gather and Structure Tax Profile with State Context
Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 5: Calculate Savings Estimate with Scenario Analysis
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: happy_path_self_employed_itemized_deductions
test_cases.scenario: Self-employed client with business income, mortgage interest, charitable donations, and medical expenses. Tests itemization decision, estimated tax payments, and business deduction optimization.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies self-employment status and calculates quarterly estimated tax payments. Compares itemized vs. standard deduction. Applies SALT cap and medical expense threshold. Identifies business deductions and timing opportunities. Provides implementation roadmap with specific deadlines.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Gather and Structure Tax Profile with State Context
Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 5: Calculate Savings Estimate with Scenario Analysis
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: happy_path_high_income_multiple_credits
test_cases.scenario: High-income client with education expenses, energy improvements, and multiple dependents. Tests credit phase-out thresholds, state-specific credits, and audit risk assessment.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies high-income status and calculates phase-out impacts on credits. Evaluates AOTC and energy credits with documentation requirements. Assesses audit risk for education and energy credits. Identifies state-specific NY credits. Provides confidence levels for each recommendation.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Gather and Structure Tax Profile with State Context
Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 5: Calculate Savings Estimate with Scenario Analysis
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: edge_case_amt_subject_high_deductions
test_cases.scenario: Client with deductions exceeding 60% of income, triggering AMT screening. Tests AMT flag, deduction limitations, and conservative scenario generation.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill flags AMT subject status as uncertain (deductions > 60% of income). Applies SALT cap and medical expense threshold. Generates conservative scenario with only high-confidence items. Recommends requesting prior year return to verify AMT status.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Gather and Structure Tax Profile with State Context
Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 5: Calculate Savings Estimate with Scenario Analysis

test_cases.name: edge_case_bunching_deductions_borderline
test_cases.scenario: Client with itemized deductions just below standard deduction threshold. Tests bunching strategy evaluation and timing opportunity identification.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies itemized deductions ($27,500) below standard deduction ($29,200). Evaluates bunching strategy: concentrating additional $1,700 of charitable gifts into current year would exceed standard deduction. Provides specific bunching recommendation with timing and feasibility.
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: edge_case_eitc_phase_out_boundary
test_cases.scenario: Single parent with income near EITC phase-out threshold. Tests credit eligibility, phase-out calculation, and income timing strategy impact.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies EITC eligibility with income at phase-out boundary ($46,000 vs. $46,560 threshold). Calculates phase-out impact if income increases. Recommends income deferral strategy to stay below phase-out. Flags EITC as high audit risk with documentation requirements.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: error_handling_incomplete_income_sources
test_cases.scenario: Client provides incomplete income information (missing rental income details). Tests error handling response and conservative estimation.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects incomplete income sources (rental income missing). Adjusts by using conservative estimate ($0 for missing rental income). Flags assumption in tax_profile. Recommends requesting detailed income statement. Marks missing income as undocumented.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Gather and Structure Tax Profile with State Context

test_cases.name: error_handling_undocumented_expenses
test_cases.scenario: Client claims deductions without supporting documentation. Tests audit risk flagging and documentation requirement specification.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies undocumented charitable deduction ($12,000) and flags as high audit risk. Identifies partially documented business expenses and flags as medium audit risk. Specifies documentation requirements (receipts, invoices, charitable acknowledgment letters). Recommends obtaining documentation before implementation.
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Identify Deductions (Federal and State)
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk

test_cases.name: quality_gate_savings_estimate_exceeds_threshold
test_cases.scenario: Optimization identifies savings exceeding 50% of current tax liability. Tests verification, breakdown by category, and confidence level adjustment.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill calculates substantial savings from child tax credits ($4,000) and dependent care credit (~$1,200). Verifies calculations and breaks down by category. Creates conservative scenario (high-confidence items only) and optimistic scenario with explicit assumptions. Flags if savings exceed 50% of tax liability.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Identify Tax Credits (Federal and State)
Phase 5: Calculate Savings Estimate with Scenario Analysis

test_cases.name: quality_gate_conflicting_recommendations_decision_framework
test_cases.scenario: Client has opportunity to both bunch deductions and defer income. Tests conflict identification and decision framework provision.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies two conflicting strategies: (1) bunch charitable gifts to exceed standard deduction, (2) defer business income to lower tax bracket. Provides decision framework: "Choose bunching if income will be lower next year; choose deferral if income will be higher." Documents trade-offs and flags as requiring client decision.
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Analyze Timing Strategies and Estimated Tax Obligations
Phase 6: Prioritize, Recommend, and Assess Implementation Risk
